SEO CONTENT CREATION FLOWCHART
PLANNING PHASE
TOPIC BRAINSTORM
Questions to Ask:
What does your audience struggle with?
What does your audience dream about?
What questions do your audience ask?
Tools to Use:
Search recommendations
Answer the Public search
Influencer YouTube channels
ORIGINAL CONTENT
Content Angles:
Best/worst of list
How to instructions
Client case study
Tell a relevant story
Interview experts
Current news trends
Question and answer
Product/service review
Keywords in Content:
Longtail Keyword (1 in title, 1 in body)
Primary Keyword (use 2-3 more times)
Keyword Variations (use 1 time each)
REPURPOSED CONTENT
Onpage Content:
Original blog entry (can include various formats)
Keywords in Content:
Variations for article sites
Variations for media sites
Video for YouTube
Audio for podcast
Slideshare presentation
Short video for social media
Image posts for social media
PRIMARY KEYWORD
Questions to Ask:
What keyword phrase has volume?
What keyword phrase is rankable?
What keyword phrase makes money?
Tools to Use:
Google keyword planner
Google search the phrases
Professional SEO tools
LONGTAIL KEYWORD
Questions to Ask:
What words can be added to extend?
How can it be more niche or specific?
What are a few keyword variations?
Tools to Use:
Google keyword planner
Google search the phrases
Professional SEO tools
CREATION PHASE
